source_scope: All 34 distinct academic works and 8 implementation/documentation sources: the 25 works cited by public ChatGPT share 6a593158-85c4-83ea-80b1-b6fb893b26bc plus 9 works added for the LDI0-01 architecture contract (SLM-114) covering multi-objective/gradient-conflict optimization, PEFT actuators, constrained decoding, and token-critical preference lineage. Canonical paper metadata was verified against arXiv (original 25 on 2026-07-16; the 9 additions on 2026-07-17); alternate URLs from the share are preserved in metadata.

sources.title: Multi-Task Learning as Multi-Objective Optimization
sources.summary: Frames multi-task learning as multi-objective optimization and finds a Pareto-stationary descent direction with a multiple-gradient descent algorithm.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Locality preservation and semantic improvement are competing objectives to be measured, not blindly summed.
metadata.limitations: No MGDA solver is implemented; the TwoTower loss stays scalarized.

sources.title: Neural Text Generation with Unlikelihood Training
sources.summary: Penalizes undesirable generations directly, including repetitive or otherwise disfavored tokens.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Use bad-token unlikelihood as the simplest localized control.
metadata.limitations: The paper studies autoregressive text, not masked OpenUI decisions.

sources.title: Gradient Surgery for Multi-Task Learning
sources.summary: Introduces PCGrad, which reduces destructive interference by projecting each conflicting task gradient onto the normal plane of the others.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Good/bad and locality/quality objectives can conflict; measure gradient geometry instead of assuming alignment.
metadata.repo_relevance: Diagnostic lens for the E249-E284 objective-support blocker
metadata.limitations: No gradient-surgery optimizer is implemented.

sources.title: LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models
sources.summary: Freezes pretrained weights and injects trainable low-rank update matrices for parameter-efficient adaptation.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: A removable low-rank actuator is a later intervention choice, separate from the DecisionEventV2 objective.
metadata.repo_relevance: Removable causal adapter reused via the existing PEFT path (LDI2 TwoTower delta)
metadata.limitations: The first LDI actuator updates existing TwoTower parameters, not a LoRA adapter.

sources.title: PICARD: Parsing Incrementally for Constrained Auto-Regressive Decoding from Language Models
sources.summary: Constrains autoregressive decoding by incrementally parsing partial outputs and rejecting continuations that cannot complete a valid parse.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Deterministic constrained decoding is retained; interventions reduce error mass on top of it, never replace it.
metadata.repo_relevance: Prior art for invariant 4 (hard grammar/compiler constraints stay deployed)
metadata.limitations: OpenUI uses its own incremental compiler forest, not PICARD's SQL parser.

sources.title: AdaLoRA: Adaptive Budget Allocation for Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning
sources.summary: Allocates the low-rank adaptation budget adaptively across weight matrices using importance-scored singular-value pruning.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Rank budgeting is an actuator hyperparameter, not an event schema.
metadata.limitations: No adaptive-rank adapter is introduced.

sources.title: Direct Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model
sources.summary: Optimizes pairwise preferences against a reference policy without a separately trained reward model.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Keep reference locality explicit when adapting preferences to one decision.
metadata.repo_relevance: Existing surrogate DPO and E253 reference control
metadata.limitations: The local TwoTower objective is not textbook sequence-level DPO.

sources.title: Sparse Autoencoders Find Highly Interpretable Features in Language Models
sources.summary: Uses sparse autoencoders to decompose polysemantic language-model activations into interpretable features.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: SAEs may diagnose states but should not replace explicit verifier evidence.
metadata.limitations: No SAE is trained or used as an oracle here.

sources.title: DeepSeekMath: Pushing the Limits of Mathematical Reasoning in Open Language Models
sources.summary: Introduces Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) and scales verifiable-reward reinforcement learning for mathematical reasoning.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Group-relative verifiable RL follows local correction and an explicit readiness gate; it is not a first LDI step.
metadata.repo_relevance: Deferred RLVR stage kept behind the RL-readiness gate
metadata.limitations: No GRPO/RL loop is implemented and no reasoning claim is made.

sources.title: DoRA: Weight-Decomposed Low-Rank Adaptation
sources.summary: Decomposes pretrained weights into magnitude and direction for parameter-efficient adaptation.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Adapter choice is an actuator, not the decision-event objective.
metadata.limitations: The initial TwoTower implementation updates its existing trainable parameters.

sources.title: PiSSA: Principal Singular Values and Singular Vectors Adaptation of Large Language Models
sources.summary: Initializes low-rank adaptation from principal singular components of pretrained weights.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Initialization is separable from the localized preference objective.
metadata.repo_relevance: Future causal-track rank and initialization ablation
metadata.limitations: No PiSSA adapter is introduced.

sources.title: ReFT: Representation Finetuning for Language Models
sources.summary: Adapts models through learned interventions on hidden representations rather than weight updates alone.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Representation interventions are a later actuator after explicit event supervision works.
metadata.limitations: No representation intervention is implemented.

sources.title: Token-level Direct Preference Optimization
sources.summary: Attributes preference updates to response tokens instead of weighting every token uniformly.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Train on the exact decision position rather than an entire generated program.
metadata.limitations: OpenUI decisions are masked-token states rather than autoregressive response tokens.

sources.title: Grammar-Aligned Decoding
sources.summary: Shows greedy grammar-constrained decoding is distributionally biased and corrects it with an adaptive sampling (ASAp) resampling scheme.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Grammar alignment corrects the distribution but never itself creates semantic preference labels; constraint shadows stay legality-only evidence.
metadata.repo_relevance: Grounds invariant 2 (constraint shadows certify legality, not preference)
metadata.limitations: No ASAp resampling is implemented.

sources.title: Scaling and Evaluating Sparse Autoencoders
sources.summary: Studies scaling laws and evaluation criteria for sparse autoencoders over language-model activations.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Any future SAE must have explicit coverage and causal evaluation.
metadata.limitations: No SAE evaluation is run.

sources.title: Turning Up the Heat: Min-p Sampling for Creative and Coherent LLM Outputs
sources.summary: Introduces min-p truncation sampling, scaling the acceptance threshold by the top token's probability to balance coherence and diversity.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Sampling-truncation controls are cheap baselines an intervention must beat, not a substitute for verified correction.
metadata.repo_relevance: Decoding-time control baseline distinct from a trained objective
metadata.limitations: TwoTower decode is compiler-constrained, not min-p sampled.

sources.title: Gemma Scope: Open Sparse Autoencoders Everywhere All At Once on Gemma 2
sources.summary: Releases and evaluates broad sparse-autoencoder suites across Gemma 2 layers and sites.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Layer-wide SAE coverage is substantial infrastructure and is not a first intervention.
metadata.limitations: Gemma Scope artifacts do not apply to TwoTower.

sources.title: AlphaEdit: Null-Space Constrained Knowledge Editing for Language Models
sources.summary: Projects model edits into a null space intended to preserve previously learned knowledge.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Preservation must be measured, not inferred from a localized target.
metadata.limitations: MSE tethering is not AlphaEdit or a null-space projection.

sources.title: TIS-DPO: Token-level Importance Sampling for Direct Preference Optimization With Estimated Weights
sources.summary: Estimates token importance so preference optimization focuses on decisions most responsible for response quality.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Event evidence supplies explicit importance instead of uniform token weighting.
metadata.limitations: The implementation does not reproduce TIS-DPO estimators.

sources.title: DeepSeek-R1: Incentivizing Reasoning Capability in LLMs via Reinforcement Learning
sources.summary: Demonstrates large-scale reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards and staged post-training.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Keep local correction before any separately gated RLVR stage.
metadata.limitations: No RL or reasoning claim is made.

sources.title: AxBench: Steering LLMs? Even Simple Baselines Outperform Sparse Autoencoders
sources.summary: Benchmarks representation steering and finds that simple baselines can outperform sparse-autoencoder methods.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Require SAE methods to beat direct supervised baselines.
metadata.limitations: The benchmark targets causal LLM steering.

sources.title: Learning to Generate Structured Output with Schema Reinforcement Learning
sources.summary: Uses schema-verifiable rewards to improve structured JSON generation.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: OpenUI grammar and contract verifiers can ground decision labels.
metadata.limitations: No schema-RL loop is implemented.

sources.title: SCAR: Shapley Credit Assignment for More Efficient RLHF
sources.summary: Uses Shapley-style credit assignment to distribute sparse preference rewards over response decisions.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Delayed failures need causal or counterfactual attribution rather than guessed blame.
metadata.limitations: No Shapley estimator is implemented.

sources.title: Discriminative Policy Optimization for Token-Level Reward Models
sources.summary: Trains token-level reward models to distinguish good and bad process decisions.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Keep verifier evidence separate from the policy objective.
metadata.limitations: No reward model is trained.

sources.title: ConfPO: Exploiting Policy Model Confidence for Critical Token Selection in Large Language Model Preference Optimization
sources.summary: Selects preference-critical tokens using policy confidence without an auxiliary model.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Decode confidence is a useful event-selection signal but not proof of blame.
metadata.limitations: Confidence alone never creates semantic labels.

sources.title: TGDPO: Harnessing Token-Level Reward Guidance for Enhancing Direct Preference Optimization
sources.summary: Adds token-level reward guidance so DPO updates vary with the local importance of each decision.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Weight exact decision pairs with explicit verifier evidence.
metadata.limitations: The implementation does not reproduce TGDPO's reward model or derivation.

sources.title: Antislop: A Comprehensive Framework for Identifying and Eliminating Repetitive Patterns in Language Models
sources.summary: Mines repetitive failure onsets and applies localized preference optimization to reduce them.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Mine on-policy failure onset and train only the exact decision state.
metadata.repo_relevance: DecisionEventV1, FTPO, and iterative remine design
metadata.limitations: TwoTower structural decisions are not natural-language phrase onsets.

sources.title: Minerva: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards for Cyber Threat Intelligence LLMs
sources.summary: Applies verifiable-reward reinforcement learning to structured cyber-threat outputs.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Machine-checkable structure is useful supervision but does not remove the RL readiness gate.
metadata.limitations: No Minerva recipe or CTI task is reproduced.

sources.title: TAB-PO: Preference Optimization with a Token-Level Adaptive Barrier for Token-Critical Structured Generation
sources.summary: Adds a token-level adaptive barrier to preference optimization so token-critical structured-generation decisions receive stronger, state-adaptive updates.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Weight token-critical structured decisions with a state-adaptive barrier at the exact state; verify before labeling.
metadata.repo_relevance: Informs DecisionEventV2 action-table weighting for token-critical decisions
metadata.limitations: The implemented clipped-margin FTPO is not TAB-PO's adaptive barrier.

sources.title: MoLoRA: Composable Specialization via Per-Token Adapter Routing
sources.summary: Routes tokens across specialized low-rank adapters for composable behavior.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Routing belongs after interventions demonstrate separable value.
metadata.limitations: No routing or adapter bank is added.

sources.title: TokenRatio: Principled Token-Level Preference Optimization via Ratio Matching
sources.summary: Formulates token-level preference optimization through ratio matching at generation decisions.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Compare good and bad actions at the same state, never across mismatched contexts.
metadata.limitations: The implemented clipped-margin loss is not TokenRatio.

sources.title: Steering LLMs? Actually, Sparse Autoencoders Can Outperform Simple Baselines
sources.summary: Revisits SAE steering and reports settings where properly evaluated SAEs outperform simple baselines.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: SAE value is empirical and requires matched direct-supervision controls.
metadata.limitations: Conflicting SAE evidence is documented rather than resolved here.

sources.title: PermDoRA -- Understanding Adapter Interference in Language Models: Limits of Parameter-Space Geometry
sources.summary: Studies interference among modular adapters and the limits of parameter-space separation heuristics.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Do not assume multiple localized adapters compose without interference tests.
metadata.limitations: The first campaign has no adapter composition.

sources.title: Reproducibility Study of AlphaEdit: Null-Space Constrained Knowledge Editing for Language Models
sources.summary: Re-evaluates AlphaEdit and tests whether its preservation claims reproduce across settings.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Locality claims need direct held-out measurements and reproduction controls.
metadata.limitations: No knowledge-editing benchmark is reproduced.

sources.title: PEFT Trainable Tokens
sources.summary: Documents selective token-embedding updates in Hugging Face PEFT.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Selective parameters are an actuator, not an event definition.
metadata.limitations: Not used by TwoTower.

sources.title: PEFT LoRA
sources.summary: Documents LoRA configuration and adapter lifecycle in Hugging Face PEFT.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: A removable causal intervention can reuse the existing PEFT path later.
metadata.limitations: No new LoRA path is created.

sources.title: TransformerLens
sources.summary: Provides activation inspection and mechanistic-interpretability tooling for transformer models.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Use only if explicit event telemetry cannot answer a later representation question.
metadata.limitations: Not integrated.

sources.title: SAELens
sources.summary: Provides training and analysis utilities for sparse autoencoders over language models.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: SAE infrastructure remains deferred behind direct baselines.
metadata.limitations: Not integrated.

sources.title: NNsight
sources.summary: Supports tracing and intervention over neural-network computations.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Generic intervention tooling is unnecessary for the first exact-logit objective.
metadata.limitations: Not integrated.

sources.title: pyreft
sources.summary: Implements representation-finetuning interventions for language models.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Representation editing remains a later actuator comparison.
metadata.limitations: Not integrated.

sources.title: Auto-Antislop
sources.summary: Mines repetitive failure onsets and trains a clipped final-token preference objective with reference-logit tethers.

metadata.license: No license file found at reviewed revision; do not copy source.
metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Borrow the documented objective behavior through an independent implementation.
metadata.limitations: Its causal final-token path is specialized to a masked TwoTower state.

sources.title: Antidoom
sources.summary: Provides token-aware repetition mining, balanced single-token event data, and localized preference training.

metadata.local_decision_takeaway: Validate exact token surfaces and balance event families without silent truncation.
metadata.limitations: OpenUI structural decisions use token IDs and verifiers rather than text-surface repetition alone.
